option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
Viewing {{ sharingCtx.viewingAs()?.ownerName || sharingCtx.viewingAs()?.ownerEmail }}'s portfolio Read-only
Portify
{{ (user.name || user.email || '?')[0].toUpperCase() }}
{{ user.name || user.githubUsername || user.email }} {{ user.email }}

Loading dashboard...

{{ error }}

Investment Portfolio Dashboard

Total Holdings
{{ formatCurrency(dashboard.header.totalHoldingsAmount) }}
Total Variation
{{ formatCurrency(dashboard.header.totalVariation.gainLossEur) }}
{{ formatPercent(dashboard.header.totalVariation.gainLossPercent) }}
Daily Change !
{{ formatCurrency(dashboard.header.dailyMetrics.gainLossEur) }}
{{ formatPercent(dashboard.header.dailyMetrics.gainLossPercent) }}
No prices available for today (market closed)
Weekly Change !
{{ formatCurrency(dashboard.header.weeklyMetrics.gainLossEur) }}
{{ formatPercent(dashboard.header.weeklyMetrics.gainLossPercent) }}
Prices unavailable for comparison
Monthly Change !
{{ formatCurrency(dashboard.header.monthlyMetrics.gainLossEur) }}
{{ formatPercent(dashboard.header.monthlyMetrics.gainLossPercent) }}
Prices unavailable for comparison
YTD Change !
{{ formatCurrency(dashboard.header.ytdMetrics.gainLossEur) }}
{{ formatPercent(dashboard.header.ytdMetrics.gainLossPercent) }}
Prices unavailable for comparison

Your Holdings

Read-only view — you cannot add transactions

No assets yet.

Start your portfolio by adding your first asset buy.

Ticker Asset Name Quantity Avg Cost Current Price Total Value Gain/Loss Taxes Actions
Total Daily Weekly Monthly YTD
{{ holding.ticker }} {{ holding.etfName }} {{ formatQuantity(holding.quantity) }} {{ formatCurrency(holding.averageCost) }} {{ formatCurrency(holding.currentPrice) }} {{ formatCurrency(holding.totalValue) }}
{{ formatCurrency(getHoldingTotalGainLoss(holding)) }}
{{ getHoldingTotalGainLossPercent(holding) !== null ? formatPercent(getHoldingTotalGainLossPercent(holding)!) : '—' }}
{{ formatCurrency(holding.dailyMetrics.gainLossEur) }}
{{ formatPercent(holding.dailyMetrics.gainLossPercent) }}
{{ formatCurrency(holding.weeklyMetrics.gainLossEur) }}
{{ formatPercent(holding.weeklyMetrics.gainLossPercent) }}
{{ formatCurrency(holding.monthlyMetrics.gainLossEur) }}
{{ formatPercent(holding.monthlyMetrics.gainLossPercent) }}
{{ formatCurrency(holding.ytdMetrics.gainLossEur) }}
{{ formatPercent(holding.ytdMetrics.gainLossPercent) }}

Portfolio Evolution

Loading portfolio evolution…

No evolution data yet.

Add your first asset buy to start tracking portfolio evolution.

No data available for the selected period.

Buy recorded on this day Portfolio value

Portfolio Allocation

No allocation yet.

Add your first asset buy to see your portfolio allocation.

{{ slice.ticker }} {{ slice.etfName }}
{{ formatCurrency(slice.value) }} {{ slice.percent.toFixed(1) }}%

Tax Summary

All taxable events — deemed disposals and sells — across your portfolio

Loading tax events…
Total Pending {{ formatCurrency(taxSummary.totalPending) }}
Pending {{ getTaxCurrentYear() }} {{ formatCurrency(getTaxPendingCurrentYear()) }}
Total Paid {{ formatCurrency(taxSummary.totalPaid) }}
Next Deemed Disposal {{ taxSummary.nextDeemedDisposalDate }}
After Allowance {{ formatCurrency(taxSummary.totalPendingAfterAllowance) }}
Annual Tax-Free Allowance: {{ formatCurrency(taxSummary.annualTaxFreeAllowance) }}
{{ row.year }} Tax due: {{ formatCurrency(row.taxBeforeAllowance) }} Allowance: −{{ formatCurrency(row.allowanceApplied) }} After allowance: {{ formatCurrency(row.taxAfterAllowance) }}
Adjusted Total Pending {{ formatCurrency(taxSummary.totalPendingAfterAllowance) }}

No tax events recorded yet. Events appear automatically when sells are made or 8-year deemed disposal rules are triggered.

{{ group.ticker }} {{ group.etfName }} {{ formatCurrency(getGroupPending(group.events)) }} pending
Date Type Taxable Gain Rate Tax Due Status Action
{{ event.eventDate }} {{ formatTaxEventType(event.eventType) }} {{ formatCurrency(event.taxableGain) }} {{ event.taxRateUsed }}% {{ formatCurrency(event.taxAmount) }} {{ event.status }} {{ event.paidAt | date:'dd MMM y' }}

My Goal

ℹ️ Goal values represent gross projected portfolio value — they do not account for taxes (CGT, Exit Tax, SIA) or inflation. Use the Projections tab for tax- and inflation-adjusted figures.

Loading goal…

No goal saved yet.

Go to Projections → ️ Versions and click the button on any version to save it as your goal.

Seeded from version #{{ userGoal.sourceVersionId }} — last saved {{ userGoal.savedAt | date:'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm' }}. You can edit the target values below; the chart updates live.

ℹ️ Monthly breakdown requires a version-linked goal. Go to Projections → ️ Versions and click on any version.
Year Target Value (€)
{{ point.year }}

Yearly Projections

⭐ Parameters loaded from default version: {{ defaultVersionName }}
Default: live portfolio value
{{ isIrishInvestor ? 'Deemed Disposal / Exit Tax' : 'CGT' }}
Deducted from taxable gains each year before CGT is applied. 0 = disabled.
SIA Tax (Alternative) ℹ️
⭐ Default version: {{ defaultVersionName }}
⭐ Graph based on default version: {{ defaultVersionName }} — edit parameters above and click Apply & Save to change. This graph reflects the parameters set above. Change any value and click Apply & Save to update.

Calculating projection…

⭐ Table based on default version: {{ defaultVersionName }} — edit parameters above and click Apply & Save to change. This table reflects the parameters set above. Change any value and click Apply & Save to update.

Calculating projection…

Year Initial Balance Total Buys Year Profit EoY Balance EoY Inflation-Corrected Tax Due After Tax Balance After Tax Balance Inflation-Corrected SIA After Tax (SIA) After Tax Infl.-Corrected (SIA)
{{ point.year }} {{ formatCurrency(point.initialBalance) }} {{ formatCurrency(point.totalBuys) }} {{ formatCurrency(point.yearProfit) }} {{ formatCurrency(point.totalAmount) }} {{ formatCurrency(point.inflationCorrectedAmount) }} {{ (point.taxPaid + point.exitTaxPaid) > 0 ? formatCurrency(point.taxPaid + point.exitTaxPaid) : '—' }} {{ isIrishInvestor ? 'ET' : 'CGT' }} {{ formatCurrency(point.afterTaxTotalAmount) }} {{ formatCurrency(point.afterTaxInflationCorrectedAmount) }} {{ formatCurrency(point.siaTax ?? 0) }} {{ formatCurrency(point.afterTaxSia ?? 0) }} {{ formatCurrency(point.afterTaxInflationCorrectedSia ?? 0) }}

Loading versions…

No versions saved yet. Click "Save new version" to create one.

Compare Name Saved At Start Amount Return % Monthly Buy Buy Inc. % Years Inflation % CGT % Exit Tax % Excl. Pre-ex. SIA %
{{ v.versionName }} ⭐ Default {{ v.savedAt | date:'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm' }} {{ (v.settings.startAmount != null && v.settings.startAmount > 0) ? formatCurrency(v.settings.startAmount) : '—' }} {{ v.settings.yearlyReturnPercent }}% {{ formatCurrency(v.settings.monthlyBuyAmount) }} {{ v.settings.annualBuyIncreasePercent }}% {{ v.settings.projectionYears }}y {{ v.settings.inflationPercent }}% {{ v.settings.cgtPercent }}% {{ v.settings.exitTaxPercent }}% {{ v.settings.excludePreExistingFromTax ? '✓' : '—' }} {{ v.settings.siaAnnualPercent > 0 ? v.settings.siaAnnualPercent + '%' : '—' }}

☑️ Select versions from the table above to compare them on the chart.

Click legend items to show or hide additional metrics. Only Projected Portfolio Value is shown by default.

My Goal

ℹ️ Goal values represent gross projected portfolio value — they do not account for taxes (CGT, Exit Tax, SIA) or inflation. Use the Projections tab for tax- and inflation-adjusted figures.

Loading goal…

No goal saved yet.

Go to Projections → ️ Versions and click the button on any version to save it as your goal.

{{ point.year }} {{ formatCurrency(point.initialBalance) }} {{ formatCurrency(point.totalBuys) }} {{ formatCurrency(point.yearProfit) }} {{ formatCurrency(point.totalAmount) }} {{ formatCurrency(point.inflationCorrectedAmount) }} {{ (point.taxPaid + point.exitTaxPaid) > 0 ? formatCurrency(point.taxPaid + point.exitTaxPaid) : '—' }} {{ isIrishInvestor ? 'ET' : 'CGT' }} {{ formatCurrency(point.afterTaxTotalAmount) }} {{ formatCurrency(point.afterTaxInflationCorrectedAmount) }} {{ formatCurrency(point.siaTax ?? 0) }} {{ formatCurrency(point.afterTaxSia ?? 0) }} {{ formatCurrency(point.afterTaxInflationCorrectedSia ?? 0) }}

Loading versions…

No versions saved yet. Click "Save new version" to create one.

Compare Name Saved At Start Amount Return % Monthly Buy Buy Inc. % Years Inflation % CGT % Exit Tax % Excl. Pre-ex. SIA %
{{ v.versionName }} ⭐ Default {{ v.savedAt | date:'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm' }} {{ (v.settings.startAmount != null && v.settings.startAmount > 0) ? formatCurrency(v.settings.startAmount) : '—' }} {{ v.settings.yearlyReturnPercent }}% {{ formatCurrency(v.settings.monthlyBuyAmount) }} {{ v.settings.annualBuyIncreasePercent }}% {{ v.settings.projectionYears }}y {{ v.settings.inflationPercent }}% {{ v.settings.cgtPercent }}% {{ v.settings.exitTaxPercent }}% {{ v.settings.excludePreExistingFromTax ? '✓' : '—' }} {{ v.settings.siaAnnualPercent > 0 ? v.settings.siaAnnualPercent + '%' : '—' }}

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
Investments Tracker
Features Irish Tax Preview How it works
Free to use  ·  No ads  ·  Privacy-first  ·  Irish tax center built-in

The investment tracker
Irish investors deserve.

Finally, a portfolio tracker that understands the complexity of Irish investment taxation — 38% Exit Tax, 8-year Deemed Disposal, and the upcoming SIA regime arriving in 2027. Track holdings in real time, project your after-tax wealth decades ahead, and compare tax regimes side by side. Configure your annual tax-free allowance and see it deducted per calendar year in your tax summary. Plus, monitor pending vs paid tax events across sells and deemed disposals with one-click mark-as-paid workflows. Also perfect for global investors with CGT calculations and inflation-adjusted returns.

Irish Tax Advantage

We calculate your deemed disposal amount due for old asset positions.

No spreadsheet gymnastics. Add your historical lots and Investments Tracker automatically surfaces upcoming deemed-disposal events, expected tax due, and pending vs paid status in one place.

38% Exit Tax calculated
8-yr rule Deemed Disposal modelled
SIA 2027 New regime comparison
Tax events Pending vs paid tracking
Allowance Annual tax-free deducted
30+ yrs Projection horizon
Scroll to explore
🇮🇪
Ireland’s new SIA investment account arrives in 2027. A flat annual rate on your total portfolio — replacing the dreaded Deemed Disposal & Exit Tax complexity. Investments Tracker already lets you compare both regimes side by side.
Features

Everything you need to invest smarter

Built for long-term investors who want clarity, not complexity. Irish tax rules baked in. Global CGT support included. Works for ETFs, stocks, funds, crypto and more.

Real-Time Prices

Investment prices are fetched from Eodhd (primary) or Yahoo Finance (fallback) with a smart cache layer. A source badge on every holding shows exactly where the price came from — real-time or cached.

Portfolio Analytics

Daily, weekly, monthly and YTD performance at a glance. See total gains, unrealised P&L, and how each holding contributes.

Allocation Chart

A live donut chart shows exactly how your capital is spread across your investments. Instantly spot if your portfolio has drifted.

Historical Evolution

Track how your portfolio has grown over time with a smooth area chart. Filter by week, month, year, or all time.

Future Projections

Model your wealth over 1–30 years using customisable return rates, monthly contributions, inflation, annual buy increases, and multiple Irish tax views.

Tax Event Center

All taxable events are tracked automatically: deemed disposals and sells, taxable gain, rate used, tax due, and status. See pending vs paid totals and mark single events, current year, or all events as paid. Configure your annual tax-free allowance and see the allowance applied per year alongside a reduced after-allowance total.

Coming 2027

SIA vs Exit Tax Comparison

Ireland’s new Savings & Investment Account simplifies tax to a flat annual rate on total holdings. Compare both regimes on the same chart and see which saves you more over time.

Portfolio Sharing

Share a read-only or collaborative view of your portfolio with a trusted friend, partner, or financial advisor in seconds.

Transaction History

Full purchase history for each investment — date, quantity, purchase price, total invested, live current price, gain/loss in EUR, and gain/loss % for every individual purchase. Green and red row highlights make profitable and underwater purchases instantly visible.

Projection Scenarios

Save multiple projection versions — bullish, bearish, base-case, or SIA-vs-Exit-Tax — and compare them side-by-side on a single chart.

Price Source Transparency

Each holding displays a source badge — Eodhd (premium), Yahoo Finance, or Cache — so you always know where the price data came from. Dashboard loads gracefully even when prices are temporarily unavailable.

App Preview

See what's waiting for you

A pixel-perfect dark dashboard built for focus — rich Irish tax projections, a dedicated tax summary center with pending/paid workflows, SIA-specific views, and color-coded buy/sell history with per-transaction performance data.

etftracker.app / dashboard
🇮🇪 Irish Investors

Ireland has some of the most complex
investment tax rules in the world.

38% Exit Tax. Deemed Disposal every 8 years. Tax on unrealised gains. No loss offsetting. Investments Tracker was built to tame all of it — and to prepare you for SIA when it arrives in 2027.

Current Regime

Deemed Disposal + Exit Tax

The rules as they stand today

Tax rate on gains 38% Exit Tax
When tax is triggered Every 8 years (even if you didn’t sell)
What is taxed Unrealised gains at the 8-year mark
Loss offsetting Not allowed
Complexity Very high — per-lot tracking required
Predictability Low — surprise bill every 8 years
Applies to ETFs, funds, offshore investments
Investments Tracker models every Deemed Disposal event automatically
VS
→
2027
SIA — 2027

Savings & Investment Account

Ireland’s simplified investment regime

Tax rate Flat annual % on portfolio value
When tax is triggered Once per year — predictable & simple
What is taxed Total portfolio value (flat rate)
Loss offsetting N/A — flat rate structure
Complexity Very low — just one number per year
Predictability High — easy to budget for annually
Applies to All qualifying investments in the SIA wrapper
Model SIA now and compare with the current regime in Investments Tracker
Already inside the app: run a 20-year projection, toggle between Exit Tax + Deemed Disposal and SIA mode on the same chart, configure your annual tax-free allowance, and keep your tax timeline clean with pending/paid status tracking and mark-paid actions.
Future Projections

See where your money is headed — decades from now

Enter your starting balance, expected annual return, monthly contributions, and inflation rate. Investments Tracker instantly models your wealth growth year by year, showing both the gross and after-tax outcome side by side — including an SIA annual tax mode that applies a yearly % to the full portfolio value.

  • Compound interest with monthly buy drip and annual buy increase %
  • Inflation-adjusted real-terms wealth
  • Irish Exit Tax automatically factored in when using the deemed-disposal model
  • Deemed Disposal (8-year rule) modelled precisely
  • SIA annual % available as an alternative yearly tax on the whole portfolio
  • Extra SIA chart lines and table columns for after-tax comparisons
  • Save & compare multiple projection scenarios — view as Graph, Data Table or Versions
Wealth Projection · 20 Years
Gross After Tax
€496,000 Gross value in 2045
€348,000 After tax (Exit Tax model)
-€148,000 Compare against SIA view in-app
Irish Tax Summary · Year 8
Portfolio value €87,240
Cost basis €52,000
Unrealised gain +€35,240
Deemed Disposal triggered Year 8 rule
Exit Tax @ 38% -€13,391
Annual tax-free allowance -€1,270
Tax after allowance -€12,121
After-tax value €75,119
Status workflow Pending → Paid
Tax calculated automatically inside every projection, with event-level status tracking, annual allowance deductions, and mark-paid actions
Irish Tax Engine

No more spreadsheet nightmares for Irish investors

Irish investors holding ETFs, stocks, and other investments face some of the most complex tax rules in Europe — 38% Exit Tax, Deemed Disposal every 8 years, and no loss offsetting. Investments Tracker was built from the ground up with these rules baked in, while also supporting SIA annual tax as an alternative yearly charge on total portfolio value.

  • 38% Exit Tax on investment gains (not CGT)
  • Deemed Disposal modelled every 8 years
  • SIA annual % available as a replacement model for yearly portfolio-wide tax
  • Option to exclude pre-2026 holdings from Exit Tax
  • Tax Summary dashboard with pending vs paid totals and one-click mark-paid actions
  • Annual tax-free allowance configurable per investor type — applied year-by-year with a clear breakdown of allowance consumed vs tax remaining
  • Year-by-year breakdown of every tax event, plus SIA rows in charts and tables
For Everyone

Not Irish? You’ll still love it.

Powerful CGT calculations, inflation-adjusted returns and multi-asset tracking make this the ideal tool for any long-term investor, anywhere in the world.

CGT Calculations

Capital Gains Tax is calculated automatically for non-Irish investors. FIFO lot matching, allowable costs and net gain at your local CGT rate. Configure your annual tax-free allowance (e.g. the UK’s £3,000 exemption) and the app deducts it per calendar year — showing tax before allowance, allowance applied, and the final reduced amount. Know your real tax position before you sell.

Inflation-Adjusted Returns

Your money’s purchasing power erodes over time. Every projection shows both nominal and inflation-adjusted “real” values so you know your true wealth trajectory, not just the headline number.

Multi-Asset, Multi-Currency

Track ETFs, stocks, index funds, bonds and crypto. Prices fetched in real time from Eodhd and Yahoo Finance. Works for any exchange-listed ticker worldwide.

Scenario Planning

Save multiple projection versions — bullish, bearish, base-case — and compare them side by side on a single chart. Make informed decisions with data, not gut feeling.

How it works

Up and running in under 2 minutes

01

Sign in instantly

One click with your GitHub or Google account. No passwords, no forms, no waiting for email verification.

02

Add your investments

Enter the ticker, number of shares and purchase price. Prices are fetched automatically in the background.

03

Track, project & plan

Watch your portfolio dashboard come alive. Run projections, compare scenarios, and see your after-tax future wealth.

Ready to take control of your investments?

Free to use. No credit card. No setup. Sign in with GitHub or Google and start tracking in seconds.

Irish investors: finally see your real after-tax wealth, track pending vs paid tax events, apply your annual tax-free allowance automatically, and model what SIA could mean for you in 2027.

We only store your email address and investment data. Zero third-party tracking.

Investments Tracker

Built for Irish investors & global long-term investors. Free to use, forever.

Features Irish Tax How it works Sign In

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
Investments Tracker
Features Irish Tax Preview How it works
Free to use  ·  No ads  ·  Privacy-first  ·  Irish tax center built-in

Portify
Own Your Portfolio.

Finally, a portfolio tracker that understands the complexity of Irish investment taxation — 38% Exit Tax, 8-year Deemed Disposal, and the upcoming SIA regime arriving in 2027. Track holdings in real time, project your after-tax wealth decades ahead, and compare tax regimes side by side. Configure your annual tax-free allowance and see it deducted per calendar year in your tax summary. Plus, monitor pending vs paid tax events across sells and deemed disposals with one-click mark-as-paid workflows. Also perfect for global investors with CGT calculations and inflation-adjusted returns.

Irish Tax Advantage

We calculate your deemed disposal amount due for old asset positions.

No spreadsheet gymnastics. Add your historical lots and Investments Tracker automatically surfaces upcoming deemed-disposal events, expected tax due, and pending vs paid status in one place.

38% Exit Tax calculated
8-yr rule Deemed Disposal modelled
SIA 2027 New regime comparison
Tax events Pending vs paid tracking
Allowance Annual tax-free deducted
30+ yrs Projection horizon
Scroll to explore
🇮🇪
Ireland’s new SIA investment account arrives in 2027. A flat annual rate on your total portfolio — replacing the dreaded Deemed Disposal & Exit Tax complexity. Investments Tracker already lets you compare both regimes side by side.
Features

Everything you need to invest smarter

Built for long-term investors who want clarity, not complexity. Irish tax rules baked in. Global CGT support included. Works for ETFs, stocks, funds, crypto and more.

Real-Time Prices

Investment prices are fetched from Eodhd (primary) or Yahoo Finance (fallback) with a smart cache layer. A source badge on every holding shows exactly where the price came from — real-time or cached.

Portfolio Analytics

Daily, weekly, monthly and YTD performance at a glance. See total gains, unrealised P&L, and how each holding contributes.

Allocation Chart

A live donut chart shows exactly how your capital is spread across your investments. Instantly spot if your portfolio has drifted.

Historical Evolution

Track how your portfolio has grown over time with a smooth area chart. Filter by week, month, year, or all time.

Future Projections

Model your wealth over 1–30 years using customisable return rates, monthly contributions, inflation, annual buy increases, and multiple Irish tax views.

Tax Event Center

All taxable events are tracked automatically: deemed disposals and sells, taxable gain, rate used, tax due, and status. See pending vs paid totals and mark single events, current year, or all events as paid. Configure your annual tax-free allowance and see the allowance applied per year alongside a reduced after-allowance total.

Coming 2027

SIA vs Exit Tax Comparison

Ireland’s new Savings & Investment Account simplifies tax to a flat annual rate on total holdings. Compare both regimes on the same chart and see which saves you more over time.

Portfolio Sharing

Share a read-only or collaborative view of your portfolio with a trusted friend, partner, or financial advisor in seconds.

Transaction History

Full purchase history for each investment — date, quantity, purchase price, total invested, live current price, gain/loss in EUR, and gain/loss % for every individual purchase. Green and red row highlights make profitable and underwater purchases instantly visible.

Projection Scenarios

Save multiple projection versions — bullish, bearish, base-case, or SIA-vs-Exit-Tax — and compare them side-by-side on a single chart.

Price Source Transparency

Each holding displays a source badge — Eodhd (premium), Yahoo Finance, or Cache — so you always know where the price data came from. Dashboard loads gracefully even when prices are temporarily unavailable.

App Preview

See what's waiting for you

A pixel-perfect dark dashboard built for focus — rich Irish tax projections, a dedicated tax summary center with pending/paid workflows, SIA-specific views, and color-coded buy/sell history with per-transaction performance data.

etftracker.app / dashboard
🇮🇪 Irish Investors

Ireland has some of the most complex
investment tax rules in the world.

38% Exit Tax. Deemed Disposal every 8 years. Tax on unrealised gains. No loss offsetting. Investments Tracker was built to tame all of it — and to prepare you for SIA when it arrives in 2027.

Current Regime

Deemed Disposal + Exit Tax

The rules as they stand today

Tax rate on gains 38% Exit Tax
When tax is triggered Every 8 years (even if you didn’t sell)
What is taxed Unrealised gains at the 8-year mark
Loss offsetting Not allowed
Complexity Very high — per-lot tracking required
Predictability Low — surprise bill every 8 years
Applies to ETFs, funds, offshore investments
Investments Tracker models every Deemed Disposal event automatically
VS
→
2027
SIA — 2027

Savings & Investment Account

Ireland’s simplified investment regime

Tax rate Flat annual % on portfolio value
When tax is triggered Once per year — predictable & simple
What is taxed Total portfolio value (flat rate)
Loss offsetting N/A — flat rate structure
Complexity Very low — just one number per year
Predictability High — easy to budget for annually
Applies to All qualifying investments in the SIA wrapper
Model SIA now and compare with the current regime in Investments Tracker
Already inside the app: run a 20-year projection, toggle between Exit Tax + Deemed Disposal and SIA mode on the same chart, configure your annual tax-free allowance, and keep your tax timeline clean with pending/paid status tracking and mark-paid actions.
Future Projections

See where your money is headed — decades from now

Enter your starting balance, expected annual return, monthly contributions, and inflation rate. Investments Tracker instantly models your wealth growth year by year, showing both the gross and after-tax outcome side by side — including an SIA annual tax mode that applies a yearly % to the full portfolio value.

  • Compound interest with monthly buy drip and annual buy increase %
  • Inflation-adjusted real-terms wealth
  • Irish Exit Tax automatically factored in when using the deemed-disposal model
  • Deemed Disposal (8-year rule) modelled precisely
  • SIA annual % available as an alternative yearly tax on the whole portfolio
  • Extra SIA chart lines and table columns for after-tax comparisons
  • Save & compare multiple projection scenarios — view as Graph, Data Table or Versions
Wealth Projection · 20 Years
Gross After Tax
€496,000 Gross value in 2045
€348,000 After tax (Exit Tax model)
-€148,000 Compare against SIA view in-app
Irish Tax Summary · Year 8
Portfolio value €87,240
Cost basis €52,000
Unrealised gain +€35,240
Deemed Disposal triggered Year 8 rule
Exit Tax @ 38% -€13,391
Annual tax-free allowance -€1,270
Tax after allowance -€12,121
After-tax value €75,119
Status workflow Pending → Paid
Tax calculated automatically inside every projection, with event-level status tracking, annual allowance deductions, and mark-paid actions
Irish Tax Engine

No more spreadsheet nightmares for Irish investors

Irish investors holding ETFs, stocks, and other investments face some of the most complex tax rules in Europe — 38% Exit Tax, Deemed Disposal every 8 years, and no loss offsetting. Investments Tracker was built from the ground up with these rules baked in, while also supporting SIA annual tax as an alternative yearly charge on total portfolio value.

  • 38% Exit Tax on investment gains (not CGT)
  • Deemed Disposal modelled every 8 years
  • SIA annual % available as a replacement model for yearly portfolio-wide tax
  • Option to exclude pre-2026 holdings from Exit Tax
  • Tax Summary dashboard with pending vs paid totals and one-click mark-paid actions
  • Annual tax-free allowance configurable per investor type — applied year-by-year with a clear breakdown of allowance consumed vs tax remaining
  • Year-by-year breakdown of every tax event, plus SIA rows in charts and tables
For Everyone

Not Irish? You’ll still love it.

Powerful CGT calculations, inflation-adjusted returns and multi-asset tracking make this the ideal tool for any long-term investor, anywhere in the world.

CGT Calculations

Capital Gains Tax is calculated automatically for non-Irish investors. FIFO lot matching, allowable costs and net gain at your local CGT rate. Configure your annual tax-free allowance (e.g. the UK’s £3,000 exemption) and the app deducts it per calendar year — showing tax before allowance, allowance applied, and the final reduced amount. Know your real tax position before you sell.

Inflation-Adjusted Returns

Your money’s purchasing power erodes over time. Every projection shows both nominal and inflation-adjusted “real” values so you know your true wealth trajectory, not just the headline number.

Multi-Asset, Multi-Currency

Track ETFs, stocks, index funds, bonds and crypto. Prices fetched in real time from Eodhd and Yahoo Finance. Works for any exchange-listed ticker worldwide.

Scenario Planning

Save multiple projection versions — bullish, bearish, base-case — and compare them side by side on a single chart. Make informed decisions with data, not gut feeling.

How it works

Up and running in under 2 minutes

01

Sign in instantly

One click with your GitHub or Google account. No passwords, no forms, no waiting for email verification.

02

Add your investments

Enter the ticker, number of shares and purchase price. Prices are fetched automatically in the background.

03

Track, project & plan

Watch your portfolio dashboard come alive. Run projections, compare scenarios, and see your after-tax future wealth.

Ready to take control of your investments?

Free to use. No credit card. No setup. Sign in with GitHub or Google and start tracking in seconds.

Own Your Portfolio.

We only store your email address and investment data. Zero third-party tracking.

Investments Tracker

Built for Irish investors & global long-term investors. Free to use, forever.

Features Irish Tax How it works Sign In
